entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INNOVATION PLATFORM
entities.description: A platform that facilitates and accelerates the transition of farmers from subsistence farming to socially inclusive, environmentally sound and market-oriented farming

entities.name: CENTRAL MOZAMBIQUE
entities.description: The geographic region where the sustainability transitions are being nudged

entities.name: SUBSISTENCE FARMING
entities.description: A type of farming focused on producing enough food to feed the farmer and their family

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE FARMING
entities.description: Farming that is socially inclusive, environmentally sound, and market-oriented

entities.name: FOOD VALUE CHAINS
entities.description: The series of activities required to bring a food product from the field to the consumer

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The complex interaction of various components in a farming environment

entities.name: INPUT/OUTPUT MARKET REQUIREMENTS
entities.description: The specific needs and standards of markets for agricultural inputs and outputs

entities.name: LEARNING ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Activities centered around entry points to strengthen stakeholder networks

entities.name: STAKEHOLDER NETWORKS
entities.description: Networks of individuals or organizations involved in the agricultural process

entities.name: TECHNICAL TRAINING SESSIONS
entities.description: Sessions used to capacitate farmers and improve self-organization

entities.name: SELF-ORGANIZATION
entities.description: The ability of farmers to organize themselves to achieve common goals

entities.name: ENTREPRENEURS
entities.description: Farmers who have transitioned to a business-oriented approach to farming

entities.name: PRIVATE SECTOR
entities.description: Business entities acting as mentors to farmers

entities.name: GOVERNMENT
entities.description: State entities acting as facilitators and support

entities.name: EXTENSION
entities.description: Agricultural extension services acting as facilitators and support

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of stakeholders to recover quickly from difficulties

entities.name: MOTIVATION
entities.description: The reason or reasons one has for acting or behaving in a particular way

entities.name: EMPOWERMENT
entities.description: The process of becoming stronger and more confident in controlling one's life
